reasoning: Feature development spanning multiple layers (database, API, UI) with schema changes and business logic for effectiveness metrics. No external integrations or unfamiliar technologies, but touches 8-12 files across data, backend, and frontend layers.

scope.notes: Will touch database models, backend API endpoints, business logic for metrics calculation, and frontend UI components for tracking display and feedback collection

integrations.notes: Works within existing GEO and recommendation systems. No external APIs or unfamiliar libraries required

infrastructure.notes: Requires database schema changes to add completion status tracking, before/after GEO scores, timestamps, and user feedback ratings

knowledge.notes: Likely extends existing recommendation and GEO score models/patterns already in codebase

concerns: Database schema migrations could affect existing data
Proper attribution of score changes to recommendations
Effectiveness calculation methodology needs clear definition
Ensuring backward compatibility with existing recommendation data
risk.notes: Medium risk due to database changes and need for accurate before/after tracking, but no security-critical or payment-related concerns

validation_recommendations.reasoning: Database schema changes and business logic for effectiveness metrics require unit tests for calculations and integration tests for API endpoints. No security-sensitive code or external integrations involved.
